name: Yankee Johnnycake
recipeIngredient: Sugar substitute equivalent to 1 tablespoon sugar
1 cup Buttermilk, made from skim milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Prepare an 8-inch by 8-inch by 2-inch pan with vegetable oil coating.
3. Sift together all dry ingredients.
4. Combine egg and buttermilk and add to dry ingredients, along with oil, all at once.
5. Stir (do not beat) just until dry ingredients are moistened.
6. Pour into the prepared pan and bake for 25-30 minutes.
7. Cut into 16 2-inch squares.
Food Exchanges per serving: 1 STARCH EXCHANGE + 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE
CHO: 13; PRO: 2g; FAT: 3; CAL: 91; Low-sodium diets: Omit salt
Source: The Art of Cooking for the Diabetic by Mary Abbott Hess, R.D., M.S. and Katharine Middleton
Brought to you and yours via Nancy O'Brion and her Meal-Master
